hero.description: Your AI conversations deserve better than messy chat lists and lost prompts. Organize everything with folders, tags, full-text search, and a prompt library — across both Gemini and AI Studio. Find any conversation in seconds, not minutes.

features.heading: Everything you need,
features.subtitle: Nine powerful features that turn a basic chat list into a productivity workspace. All running locally in your browser.
features.multiPlatformDesc: Works seamlessly across both Gemini and AI Studio. One sidebar to manage all your AI conversations, no matter which platform you prefer.
features.foldersTagsDesc: Organize conversations into nested folders and tag them for quick filtering. Build a structure that matches how you actually think and work.
features.promptLibraryDesc: Save, categorize, and reuse your best prompts. Stop rewriting the same instructions — build a personal library you can access in one click.
features.searchDesc: Find any conversation instantly with powerful full-text search. No more scrolling through endless chat lists to locate that one thread.
features.driveSyncDesc: Sync your settings, prompts, and configuration across devices via Google Drive. Your data stays yours — chat content is never uploaded.
features.uiCustomDesc: Adjust the sidebar width, theme, and layout to fit your workflow. Make the interface feel like it was built just for you.
features.multiAccountDesc: Switch between multiple Google accounts without losing your place. Keep work and personal conversations neatly separated.
features.exportDesc: Export your conversations in multiple formats for backup, sharing, or further analysis. Your data is always portable.
features.imageDownloadDesc: Download AI-generated images without watermarks. Get clean, ready-to-use visuals directly from your conversations.

video.heading: See how it works
video.subtitle: A quick walkthrough of the key features and how they fit into your daily workflow.

install.heading: Get started in seconds
install.subtitle: Pick your browser and install. No account needed, no setup required.

openSource.heading: Open source,
openSource.description: Licensed under GPL-3.0. Read the code, report issues, or submit a pull request. This is an independent project and is not affiliated with Google.

footer.disclaimer: This is an independent project and is not affiliated with Google.
